narrative: Hawkish repricing of Fed rate bets following hotter US CPI supports the dollar as JPY extends its decline — USD/JPY firms to 157.87 on a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage. AUD/JPY bilateral divergence dominates the G8 as AUD leads (+0.695%, n=4) and JPY lags (-0.515%, n=7) with a 1.210% spread; gold higher +0.40% near $4,706; equities -0.16%; DXY +0.24%; VIX 17.9. Watch US PPI at 12:30 UTC for further USD directional momentum.
